message:
fix(witness): verify work on main before resetting abandoned beads (#2036)

When a zombie polecats HEAD commit is already on the default branch,
close the bead instead of resetting it for re-dispatch. This prevents
wasted spawn-die-recover cycles when polecats die during the gt done
cleanup window after their work is already merged.

Uses the existing verifyCommitOnMain function (already battle-tested in
HandleMerged). Fail-safe: if the check errors, falls through to normal
reset behavior. Placed after dedup guard and before circuit breaker.

Also: installMockBd now returns (*BdCli, *mockBdCalls) so callers can
both inject the mock provider and verify invocations.

Closes #2036. Based on PR #2223 (rebased + nit fix: log bd close errors
instead of swallowing them).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
